basic_details.organization_name: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series)
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has published the Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Consultant positions on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding an MBA or a postgraduate degree in Commerce, Economics, Management, or an equivalent qualification are eligible to apply online on or before 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age for All Posts: 40 years. Age will be reckoned as on 01 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/PG Degree in commerce/ Economics/Management or Equivalent
qualification.details: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series): MBA/PG Degree in commerce/ Economics/Management or Equivalent

vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series)

salary_details.details: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series): Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSI Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICSI Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICSI Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICSI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICSI Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series): MBA/PG Degree in commerce/ Economics/Management or Equivalent

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age for All Posts: 40 years. Age will be reckoned as on 01 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series): Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSI Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series) posts in the ICSI Recruitment 2026. This offers a good opportunity for eligible candidates to join the Institute.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process for ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026 starts on 15 July 2026 and the last date to apply online is 30 July 2026. Candidates should ensure to apply within this period.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant posts at ICSI?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Consultant posts should not be more than 40 years of age. The age will be calculated as on 01 July 2026. No age relaxation details are specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required qualification for ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA/PG Degree in commerce/ Economics/Management or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institution to be eligible for the Consultant posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Consultant position at ICSI?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Consultant position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month. This is a contractual position with a competitive pay scale.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ICSI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of ICSI (www.icsi.edu) or use the direct apply link provided in the Important Links section. Ensure to fill all details correctly and submit before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ICSI Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant posts at ICSI includes a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates will need to perform well in both stages to be considered for selection.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the job location be for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The job location for the Consultant posts will be in New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110003. This offers an opportunity to work in the capital city.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Consultant (PMQ, Certificate & Crash Courses and Capacity Building Series) posts under ICSI Recruitment 2026 are on a Contractual basis. This provides an opportunity for fixed-term engagement with the organization.
